b9dec3e99","dweb:/ipfs/QmTBExeX2SDTkn5xbk5ssbYSx7VqRp9H4Ux1CY4uQM4b9N"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcf74f855663ce2ae00ed8352666b7935f6cddea2932fdf2c3ecd30a9b1cd0e97","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9f660b1f351b757dfe01438e59888f31f33ded3afcf5cb5b0d9bf9aa6f320a8b","dweb:/ipfs/QmarDJ5hZEgBtCmmrVzEZWjub9769eD686jmzb2XpSU1cM"]}},"version":1}

params._resolutionTime: Unix timestamp after which the market may be resolved.
params._tokenAddress: ERC20 collateral; use address(0) for native ETH.

returns._0: marketId     The new market's ID (1-indexed, equals marketCount after call).

getMarket(uint256).details: Return values are named so ethers.js can access them as properties         (e.g. `m.status`).

params._betId: Bet to list; must be owned by msg.sender.
params._price: Ask price in the market's collateral token.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params._amount: Collateral to stake (ignored for ETH markets — use msg.value).
params._minShares: Minimum shares expected; reverts with "Slippage exceeded" if not met.
params._outcomeIndex: Index into the market's outcomes array.

returns._0: betId        Unique ID for this bet position.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params._tokenAddress: address(0) for ETH; otherwise the ERC20 contract.

buyPosition(uint256).notice: Buy a listed position.  Ownership of the bet transfers to the         buyer; the seller receives the list price immediately.

calculateShares(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Shares received for a given deposit.         This implementation uses a 1:1 mapping (shares = amount).

cancelListing(uint256).notice: Cancel an active listing and reclaim ownership.

claimWinnings(uint256).notice: Claim winnings (or settle a loss) for a specific bet.         Winners receive their proportional share of the total pool minus         the 2% platform fee.  Losers receive nothing but the call is still         valid so reputation can be recorded.  Cannot be called twice.

getAvailableFees(address).notice: Returns the platform fees available to withdraw for a token.

getMarketBets(uint256).notice: All bet IDs placed in a market, in placement order.

getPrice(uint256,uint256).notice: Implied probability of an outcome expressed as a WAD (1e18 = 100%).         Returns 0 if the pool is empty.

getTotalPool(uint256).notice: Total collateral locked in a market.

getUserBets(address).notice: All bet IDs ever associated with a user (includes bought positions).

listPosition(uint256,uint256).notice: List a bet position for sale.

placeBet(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256.notice: Place a bet on an outcome.

resolveMarket(uint256,uint256).notice: Resolve a market.  Only callable by the market's arbitrator after         resolutionTime has passed.

withdrawFees(address).notice: Withdraw all accrued platform fees for a given collateral token.
